data_root_resolution.rule: use the literal W2-09 source-of-truth root; do not substitute or copy data

cohort.file_access: open only explicit <val_root>/<val_A_id>.segir.json and matching .truth.json; no val directory glob

inference.probability: arithmetic mean of three predict_proba[:,1] arrays
inference.feature_pipeline: import W2-09, CubiCasa base extractor dependencies, and cml_ctx read-only; call the same base evidence core, drawing_context, and W2-09 _assemble_context

definitions.auprc: average precision when both labels exist; otherwise null

axes.length_quantile: global val-A segment-length quintiles with deterministic linear quantiles
axes.thickness_channel: present iff finite thickness > 0, else absent
axes.parallel_gap_quantile: missing plus global finite nearest-gap quintiles
axes.layer_census_bucket: unique nonempty IR layer count per drawing: 1, 2-4, 5-9, 10+

error_clustering.nonfinite_imputation: feature median within the error population; all-nonfinite becomes 0
error_clustering.standardization: population mean and population standard deviation; zero scale becomes 1
error_clustering.ordering: descending cluster size, then original cluster label
error_clustering.witnesses: five nearest rows to standardized centroid; ties drawing_id then drawing_row_index
error_clustering.center_reporting: all 29 center features in original units

residual_feature_association.indicator: prediction error on all val-A rows
residual_feature_association.features: each graph17 and each context12 feature
residual_feature_association.statistic: point-biserial Pearson correlation on finite rows
residual_feature_association.multiple_testing: Benjamini-Hochberg q across the 29 finite tests

family_auprc.distribution: minimum, q1, median, q3, maximum over families with both classes
family_auprc.bottom_list: lowest 20 finite family AUPRC, tie family_id; include n and class counts
family_auprc.undefined: separately count families lacking either class

one_hop_bucket.orientation: 12 bins of undirected axial angle derived from sin2t/cos2t

two_hop_proxy.mixed_pair_ratio: sum(n_positive*n_negative) / sum(n_bucket choose 2) over buckets with at least two rows
two_hop_proxy.fn_candidate_ratio: FN rows in mixed-label one-hop buckets / all FN rows

two_hop_indicators.junction_of_junction_degree: sum of intersection-junction fanout over unique one-hop junction neighbors
two_hop_indicators.parallel_second_ring_count: unique graph-distance-2 nodes reached with a parallel-band second edge, excluding self and direct neighbors
two_hop_indicators.parallel_second_ring_mean_gap_norm: mean minimum normal-offset attribute per such second-ring node; 0 when absent

two_hop_proxy.pair_difference_statistics: exact cross-label pair count, exact mean absolute difference, exact nonzero-difference fraction, and pair-weighted label means for each indicator
two_hop_proxy.two_hop_separable_fn: FN in a mixed bucket whose 3-indicator vector differs from at least one negative row in that bucket

selftest.determinism: compare a fresh second ledger construction with the stored first construction using all-field canonical digest
selftest.claim_wording: 휘발 필드(runtime·타임스탬프) 제외 수치 전 필드 동일
selftest.val_b_guard: opened drawing IDs must equal the 198 val-A IDs exactly; a manifest val-B ID must be rejected before filesystem access
selftest.test_guard: non-val split must be rejected before filesystem access
